title: campanula cochleariifolia subf. foliosa
intro: Campanula cochleariifolia subf. foliosa, also known as the bellflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Campanula genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Campanula cochleariifolia subf. foliosa include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected area.
